entity: Dirk Nowitzki All-NBA selections = 12 (BBR-canonical and warehouse value agree)

query_target.sql: SELECT cast(count(*) AS INTEGER) AS n FROM fact_player_awards WHERE player_id = 1717 AND award_type = 'All-NBA'

notes: Dirk Nowitzki's 12 All-NBA selections (4 First Team, 5 Second Team, 3 Third Team). BBR and warehouse agree exactly. Retired, so count is fixed at 12. CAST(... AS INTEGER) keeps the count as a JSON number (not BIGINT-as-string) so the equals comparison is numeric.
